sql:
WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT fpe.BRUT_PRIM_TL
  FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK fpe
  JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET ppo ON fpe.POLICE_ID = ppo.POLICE_ID
  JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH gt ON ppo.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = gt.TARIH_ID
  WHERE gt.TARIH_ID = :report_period
)
SELECT SUM(BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS PRIM_TL
FROM filtered_data
FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Replaced hardcoded period filter with :report_period bind variable using TANZIM_TARIH_ID context.
risk_notes: Ensure :report_period is correctly bound to a valid TARIH_ID from EK TANZIM date basis.
description:
Question answered: Alternative SQL interpretation of the user request.
Tables used: AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH, AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK
Filters: gt.TARIH_ID = :report_period ) SELECT SUM(BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS PRIM_TL FROM filtered_data
Grouping/measures: No GROUP BY clause (row-level or pre-aggregated output).
Expected output columns: fpe.BRUT_PRIM_TL
Assumptions: A report period value must be provided at runtime.

sql:

JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH gt ON ppo.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = gt.TARIH_ID
WHERE gt.TARIH_ID = :report_period
FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY

sql:
WITH filtered_data AS (
  SELECT fpe.BRUT_PRIM_TL
  FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK fpe
  JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET ppo ON fpe.POLICE_ID = ppo.POLICE_ID
  JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH gt ON ppo.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = gt.TARIH_ID
  WHERE gt.TARIH = :report_period
)
SELECT SUM(BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS PRIM_TL
FROM filtered_data
FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Replaced hardcoded period filter with :report_period bind variable using TANZIM_TARIH_ID context.
risk_notes: Ensure :report_period is correctly formatted and corresponds to valid TARIH_ID values.
